candidate_definition_hints.text: [ACL 2024 🔥] Video-ChatGPT is a video conversation model capable of generating meaningful conversation about videos. It combines the capabilities of LLMs with a pretrained visual encoder adapted for spatiotemporal video representation. We also introduce a rigorous 'Quantitative Evaluation Benchmarking' for video-based conversational models.

source_repo_description: [ACL 2024 🔥] Video-ChatGPT is a video conversation model capable of generating meaningful conversation about videos. We also introduce a rigorous 'Quantitative Evaluation Benchmarking' for video-based conversational models.
